message:
feat(simulate): add output formats with redaction/truncation (git_safety_guard-1gt.8.3)

- Add --redact, --truncate, --top CLI flags to SimulateCommand
- Add SimulateOutputConfig, SimulateJsonOutput structs
- Implement format_pretty_output() and format_json_output() functions
- Add redact_and_truncate_command() helper
- Make redact_quoted_strings() and redact_aggressively() public
- Update handler to use new formatting functions

The output now supports:
- Pretty output: Summary header, top rules table, sample commands
- JSON output: schema_version, totals, rules[], errors[]
- Privacy: truncation and --redact support (none/quoted/aggressive)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
